questionHtml: Find the lowest cost road system and state the cost of building it. Show clearly the steps of the algorithm.
markschemeHtml:
EITHER          

using Prim’s algorithm, starting at A

       A1A1A1A1A1

lowest cost road system contains roads AC, CD, CF, FE and AB       A1

cost is 20       A1

OR

using Kruskal’s algorithm

       A1A1A1A1A1

lowest cost road system contains roads CD, CF, FE, AC and AB       A1

cost is 20       A1

Note: Accept alternative correct solutions.

[7 marks]

meta.title: Find the lowest cost road system and state the cost of building it. Show clearly the steps of the algorithm.
